scope_note: Inspector scoped to the 7 files listed in --changed-files parameter. The full git diff HEAD~1 HEAD also includes docs/dev/INDEX.md, docs/dev/dev-report-dev-20260526-044731.json, docs/dev/qa-report-dev-20260526-044731.json, and tests/generated/20260524-205206/INDEX.md; those files are active recent dev artifacts and introducing no cleanup issues — they are advisory/non-blocking per AC-12.1 Mechanism (ii). All findings below apply only to the listed 7 files.

naming_violations.reason: Uppercase filename detected by normalize-doc-names.sh. However this is a pre-existing project-wide convention for root-level INDEX.md files (used consistently across all folder-level INDEX.md files). This finding is pre-existing and not introduced by this diff.
naming_violations.recommendation: advisory — pre-existing convention, no action required in this cycle

orphaned_subagents.reason: Not referenced by any command (detected by detect-orphan-agents.sh)
orphaned_subagents.recommendation: pre-existing finding — not introduced by this diff, advisory only

unreferenced_scripts.reason: Path-local commit_count=1 (new path, result of rename from step7-spec-continue.py). Historical lineage exists via rename. Script IS functionally referenced in: commands/commit.md (cited as executable reference harness for Step 7 selection), scripts/README.md, scripts/INDEX.md, and tests/generated/20260524-205206/test_AC_05_e5f7a9b1c4d6e8fb.py (STEP7_HARNESS path constant). NOT an orphan.
unreferenced_scripts.recommendation: no action — fully referenced, commit_count=1 reflects rename not creation from scratch

obsolete_functionality.reason: assertion[4] in runtime_test_phase_b_non_bulk_fallback still reads 'Spec-continue marker observed (per (c)(i) or (c)(ii))' — uses old 'Spec-continue' terminology after rename to 'Spec-update'. Also, _purpose_note references 'spec-continue trigger'. These strings were PRE-EXISTING in HEAD~1 and were NOT introduced or modified by this diff. The diff only updated the 'no spec-continue marker' → 'no spec-update marker' string in the bulk=true block; the non-bulk assertion label was not updated.
obsolete_functionality.recommendation: advisory — pre-existing stale assertion label; no cleanup required in this diff cycle

duplicate_content.reason: detect-duplicate-content.sh reports byte-identical file groups in projects/ and worktrees/ runtime directories. All are pre-existing, not related to the changed files in this diff.
duplicate_content.recommendation: advisory — pre-existing, not in scope of this diff

detect_orphan_scripts.note: 17 orphaned scripts detected across the full repo. None are in the --changed-files set. All are pre-existing (introduced_in_diff: false). Full detail available via detect-orphan-scripts.sh output.

detect_duplicate_content.note: Multiple byte-identical file groups detected in projects/, worktrees/ runtime directories. All pre-existing, not in --changed-files scope.

summary.verdict: CLEAN — no cleanliness violations introduced in this diff
summary.diff_characterization: Rename of scripts/step7-spec-continue.py to scripts/step7-spec-update.py with complete cross-reference updates across INDEX.md, commands/commit.md, scripts/INDEX.md, scripts/README.md, test_AC_05_e5f7a9b1c4d6e8fb.py, and manifest.json. One pre-existing stale assertion label in manifest.json (introduced_in_diff:false) is advisory only.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 4 actionable findings and 1 observation-only: (1) scope note needed for omitted files in the full diff; (2) incorrect Safety Rule rationale cited for INDEX.md naming exemption; (3) step7-spec-update.py metadata should clarify rename lineage not brand-new creation; (4) stale_references is not a valid schema category — should be mapped to obsolete_functionality. No Safety Rule violations found.

findings.issue: Draft's changed-files list omits files present in actual git diff (docs/dev/INDEX.md, docs/dev/dev-report, docs/dev/qa-report, tests/generated/20260524-205206/INDEX.md)
findings.proposed_fix: Add a scope_note explaining the --changed-files parameter is a subset of the full diff; classify omitted files as active dev artifacts with introduced_in_diff:false and no cleanup needed
findings.rationale: Codex correctly identified the mismatch; scope_note added to report explaining this

findings.issue: Incorrect Safety Rule rationale: INDEX.md uppercase naming was attributed to CLAUDE/README/ARCHITECTURE Safety Rule exemption, which does not cover generic INDEX.md files
findings.proposed_fix: Rephrase: uppercase INDEX.md is a pre-existing project convention; finding is pre-existing (introduced_in_diff:false), not exempt due to the CLAUDE.md/README.md/ARCHITECTURE.md Safety Rule
findings.rationale: Rationale corrected in naming_violations finding — removed incorrect Safety Rule citation

findings.issue: step7-spec-update.py described as 'new file, just created' loses rename lineage from step7-spec-continue.py
findings.proposed_fix: Change wording to: renamed script with low path-local commit count; historical lineage exists via rename. Must not be deleted.
findings.rationale: Unreferenced_scripts finding updated to reflect rename lineage

findings.issue: stale_references is not a valid cleanliness-inspector schema category; should be mapped to obsolete_functionality
findings.proposed_fix: Move to obsolete_functionality with severity minor, introduced_in_diff:false, recommendation: advisory
findings.rationale: Item remapped to obsolete_functionality in final report

findings.issue: No proposed deletion/relocation Safety Rule violation found

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 4 PROPOSED_FIX items applied: (1) scope_note added; (2) INDEX.md rationale corrected; (3) step7-spec-update.py renamed-not-new wording applied; (4) stale_references remapped to obsolete_functionality
